summary: Iteration 125 testing complete: Seasonal Exclusive Frequencies feature verified. All backend APIs pass (8/8). All frontend features verified working correctly including Quick Meditate FAB visibility rules, Cosmic Mixer frequencies (Founder's Harmonic + Vernal Awakening), and Leaderboard categories.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with collected spring-equinox frequency
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 125 features verified. Seasonal frequencies system working correctly. Spring Equinox (Vernal Awakening 396.5Hz) appears in Cosmic Mixer. User has already collected spring-equinox. Summer Solstice correctly returns 'unavailable' when out of season.

seasonal_active_api.details: Returns active, upcoming, collected frequencies with correct structure. total_possible=4

seasonal_collect_already_collected.details: Returns 'unavailable' (out of season in January) or 'already_collected' if in season

seasonal_collect_unavailable.details: Returns 'unavailable' with reason mentioning summer season

seasonal_hz_values.details: All seasonal frequencies have .5 offset Hz values: spring=396.5, summer=639.5, autumn=741.5, winter=852.5

founder_status_api.details: Returns is_founder=true with exclusive_frequency (432.11Hz Founder's Harmonic)

leaderboard_api.details: Returns all 4 categories: leaderboard, brightest_aura, most_helpful, founders

visibility_rules.homepage: PASS - FAB NOT visible on '/' (hidden route)
visibility_rules.auth_page: PASS - FAB NOT visible on '/auth' (hidden route)
visibility_rules.cosmic_mixer: PASS - FAB NOT visible on '/cosmic-mixer' (hidden route)
visibility_rules.starseed_adventure: PASS - FAB visible and clickable, shows toast on activation
visibility_rules.starseed_realm: PASS - FAB visible with 'Quick Meditate' tooltip

quick_meditate_fab.functionality: PASS - FAB clicks toggle meditation on/off with toast notifications

cosmic_mixer_page.total_frequencies: 17 frequency buttons found including standard, founder, and seasonal

starseed_realm_page.founder_badge_display: PASS - data-testid='founder-badge-display' shows 'Cosmic Founder' with 'Exclusive Founder's Harmonic unlocked in Mixer'
